title: Assistant Store Manager - Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services:
Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services!
